export_argv: import onnx,os,shutil,sys,tempfile,torch; d=tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix='petcare-onnx-opset13-'); p=os.path.join(d,'yolo11n.pt'); shutil.copy2(sys.argv[1],p); original=torch.onnx.export; torch.onnx.export=lambda *a,**kw: original(*a,**{**kw,'dynamo':False}); from ultralytics import YOLO; out=YOLO(p).export(format='onnx',imgsz=640,opset=13,dynamic=False,simplify=False,batch=1,device='cpu'); m=onnx.load(out); keep={x.key:x.value for x in m.metadata_props if x.key!='date'}; onnx.helper.set_model_props(m,keep); onnx.save(m,out); print(out)
